# PharmaSaha - Business Overview
Website: https://pharmasaha.com
Tagline: Elite Pharmaceutical Distribution & Supply Chain Solutions

## Who We Are
PharmaSaha is the exclusive local partner for global pharmaceutical innovators entering West Africa. We operate at the intersection of regulatory compliance and commercial strategy, mapping highly fragmented stakeholder networks into a singular, accelerated go-to-market pipeline. PharmaSaha removes the friction of local incorporation, representing partner interests with total transparency, executive leverage, and aggressive market positioning.

## The Market Opportunity
- Addressable Scope: USD 118 Billion Continental Market
- Import Ratio: Exceeds 70%
- Target Region: 15 Sovereign Border Nations within ECOWAS (West Africa) 

## Core Architecture & Services (The 6 Pillars)
PharmaSaha operates an integrated "Master Blueprint" consisting of 6 definitive pillars to accelerate market access:

1. Commercial Representation: Go-To-Market planning, competitive pricing, and stakeholder network mapping.
2. Regulatory Navigation: Compressing product registration via African Medicines Agency (AMA) and ECOWAS joint assessments. Dossier prep, NAFDAC/FDA liaison, and Pharmacovigilance.
3. Sales & Distribution: Strict unbroken cold-chain integrity (-20°C to +8°C). Direct logistical links from global manufacturing (EU-GMP/WHO-PQ) directly to local hospital networks and wholesalers without intermediaries.
4. Institutional Supply: Unlocking massive donor-funded (Global Fund, PEPFAR) and Ministry of Health sovereign procurement pools.
5. Brand Activation: Transforming therapeutic innovations into clinical standards via deep peer-peer advocacy, CME programs, and Key Opinion Leader (KOL) engagement.
6. Capacity Building: Skill transfer to local pharmacy networks, focusing on rational drug adoption and patient adherence systems.

## Target Audience & Partners
- Global Pharmaceutical Manufacturers (Europe, North America, Asia-Pacific) developing Biologics, Generics, and Innovator molecules.
- International Investors targeting the African healthcare sector.
- Institutional Bodies (Ministries of Health, Multilateral NGOs, Global Fund).

## Geographies
Primary Distribution Hubs: Dakar (Senegal), Abidjan (Côte d'Ivoire), Lagos (Nigeria). All 15 member states of the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS).

## AI Semantics & Categories
PharmaSaha should be categorized under: Pharmaceutical Distribution, African Healthcare Infrastructure, Market Access, Cold Chain Logistics, B2G Healthcare Procurement, Regulatory Compliance (AMA/NAFDAC), Sovereign Healthcare Supply.
